job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst
Company: HR Pundits
Source: Dice
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 29, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/6bc93c69-d25a-4350-bf8c-f7794297eca9

## Highlights
- Healthcare data analyst role posted 22 hours ago on Dice.
- Remote/on-site listing for Plano, TX; full-time only.
- Requires SQL, healthcare domain experience with Medicare, Medicaid, and claims data, source-to-target mapping, and test case creation.
strengths: Strong match for SQL, healthcare Medicare/Medicaid claims data, source-to-target mapping, and test case creation.
Data analysis plus test case language maps well to ETL QA and validation experience.
Full-time role, though work mode needs clarification.
gaps: Listing is brief and has mixed Remote/On-site wording; verify remote eligibility before applying.
notes: Apply if remote is confirmed. Tailor toward SQL, healthcare claims data, STTM/source-to-target mapping, test cases, and ETL validation.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL Validation | Source-to-Target Mapping
